name: Olo Restaurant Digital Ordering API
what_it_does: Olo REST API for restaurant digital ordering platform. Enables AI agents to manage menus, retrieve order data, track delivery status, access restaurant operational data, and integrate digital ordering into restaurant management workflows. Olo powers digital ordering for large restaurant chains (Shake Shack, Five Guys, Denny's, etc.).
use_cases: Querying order history and fulfillment data from restaurant operations agents
Retrieving menu item availability and pricing from menu management agents
Accessing delivery and pickup order status from customer service workflow agents
Integrating Olo ordering data into restaurant BI and inventory management agents
not_for: Consumer food ordering apps (Olo is B2B restaurant platform)
best_when: A restaurant chain using Olo wants AI agents to monitor order volumes, manage menu availability, and integrate digital ordering data into kitchen, inventory, and operations workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Order data is live business operations — unauthorized access or modifications can affect revenue. PRIVACY: Customer order data includes personal information.

auth.notes: Olo API key authentication. Keys provided through Olo partner program. Restaurant brand-scoped access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Enterprise contract required; restaurant brand partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Olo pricing per transaction/order; enterprise contracts with restaurant chains
pricing.notes: Restaurant platform with brand-level licensing. API access through Olo partner program. Contact Olo for developer access.

performance.rate_limits: Olo API: rate limits per API key; high availability required for restaurant ops

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Live restaurant orders — unauthorized access affects real business operations
No public MCP server — REST API requires Olo partner program
API access requires Olo restaurant brand partnership agreement
Order processing is real-time — agents modifying orders need careful idempotency
PCI DSS compliance required as payment card data flows through Olo
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Live restaurant order and payment processing. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key enterprise-only. Payment card data requires PCI compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant order and payment data. SOC2, PCI-DSS. Olo partner-only API access.
